title: Universal Connector + Remediation Board — Circuit Breaker & Sync Health
description: universal_connector.py implements async Jira/GitHub/Slack fan-out with circuit breaker pattern, httpx async client, and severity mapping. test_remediation_board.py and test_vuln_workflow_engine.py cluster here. Gap: the circuit breaker state is in-memory and resets on process restart, losing failure history. The remediation board has ticket CRUD but does not show connector sync status per ticket.
missing: Persistent circuit breaker state: persist circuit breaker open/closed/half-open state and failure_count to SQLite so it survives process restarts
Connector sync status per ticket: add last_synced_at and connector_status columns to remediation_board tickets, updated on each connector fan-out
Connector retry queue: when circuit breaker is open, queue failed deliveries in connector_retry.db and replay when circuit closes
